voters.name: Rick
voters.comment: A big fan of this song.  Never heard of Big Data but something that is absolutely in my realm of listening.   They deserve I deep dive into their music.

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: This song sounds familiar to me, where do I know this song from??? Or does it just sound similar to another song I know? Idk either way I really like it! Probably my second favorite song this week

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: Never heard them, but I dig!

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: One of my faves of the round. Just really cool vibes.

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: Ahh I remember them from Business of Emotion. I liked this!

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: Very different from their other song we had, business of emotion, but I really liked the acoustic vibes
